title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. vestita
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. vestita, also known as Pincushion Scabious or Scabious, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Scabiosa columbaria subsp. vestita include its potential to alleviate skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried herb, and its flowers can be used as a tea or made into a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
